sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this beat'em up title

special_mechanics.name: Terror Mask Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Rick can transform into a hulking, monstrous version by filling the Power Meter with Eldritch Orbs. In this state, Rick is significantly stronger with enhanced attack range and damage output. Special attack uses flesh extending from chest area as a weapon.

physics_values.damage_multiplier: fair bit more damage than normal

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Rick can pick up and wield weapons (baseball bat, cleaver, etc.). In normal form, weapons are swung for standard damage. In Terror Mask form, weapons are flung at enemies for increased damage.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Beat'em up gameplay emphasizes combat and exploration over precise platforming physics. No quantitative movement or gravity parameters documented in available sources. Game mechanics focus on combat mechanics and time-based level completion rather than precise character movement physics.
